source.notes: trackerRow values follow the synced `rowNumber` values in workdir/source-sync/lokesh-deliverables-tracker/latest.json. The capability block starts at row 3 because earlier tracker rows are infra items. Default runs are simulated stubs unless SUPPLIER_BOT_HARNESS_LIVE=1 + export + GEMINI_API_KEY.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run goalgen-explicit-goals-array and inspect inputsView.goals to confirm the harness can pass a goals array through the adapter boundary.
capabilities.blockingReason: Simulated mode does not prove production goal-generation quality.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: This harness does not fingerprint prompt revisions. Verify this line item in the supplier-bot export or repo history, not in the UI.
capabilities.blockingReason: No harness scenario can honestly prove which prompt revision is active.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: The harness only calls handleIncomingMessage with SR/goals/history/contextText. Internal prompt assembly is not surfaced separately here.
capabilities.blockingReason: Prompt assembly is hidden inside the export and not observable in this harness.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run any linked scenario to inspect the contract-shaped transcript, turn payloads, and reply/tool envelope.
capabilities.blockingReason: Default runs are simulated, so this does not prove production wording or tool fidelity.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run context-cross-supplier-internal-anchor and inspect inputsView.contextText plus the seeded history.
capabilities.blockingReason: The harness does not prove the live model will never leak competitor identity.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: After any run, inspect conversationEnd.summaryText, signals, and toolCalls in the UI or API.
capabilities.blockingReason: The default summary path is simulated and not production-scored.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: No brain receipt path is packaged in this harness tonight.
capabilities.blockingReason: A real brain URL and delivery receipt loop are not wired here.

capabilities.detail: Read images, send URLs, send logo/design files, image integration pending
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run the media replay scenarios to verify sheet-backed URLs, transcript ordering, and operator-visible media plumbing.
capabilities.blockingReason: Image integration into the live prompt remains pending, so this is not full file-handling proof.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: With live export enabled, compare runs with and without images for manual grounding checks.
capabilities.blockingReason: Simulated mode does not exercise real vision or grounding.

capabilities.detail: Escalate to brain when supplier requests assets or other blocked inputs
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run escalation-logo-asset-request and inspect transcript plus summary-envelope outputs.
capabilities.blockingReason: Real escalation routing and human queue handling still live outside this folder.

capabilities.detail: Emit scheduling tool calls; Sourcy cron executes real timers
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Inspect schedulerView.emittedToolCalls and the scenario-level honesty notes.
capabilities.blockingReason: Cron-side execution is not part of the harness and trigger-time behavior is still judgment-heavy.

capabilities.detail: Re-engagement and price-reduction follow-up logic after an initial quotation
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Run negotiation-round2-discount to inspect the re-engagement frame and per-turn envelope.
capabilities.blockingReason: Supplier lines are synthetic and the bot reply is stubbed unless live mode is enabled.

capabilities.detail: 15-20 supplier live batch once Tek infra is stable
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Use this harness for contract rehearsal only until the live batch is unblocked.
capabilities.blockingReason: Live supplier traffic remains infra-gated outside this package.

capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: Use the supplier-bot benchmark/eval workspace for scores; this harness is not the judge runner.
capabilities.blockingReason: Score aggregation intentionally lives outside this harness.

capabilities.detail: Parallel experiment with Piyush that needs a supplier-bot interface in 1-2 days
capabilities.whatLokeshCanTest: This harness can inform interface discussions, but it does not wire Tek's brain experiment.
capabilities.blockingReason: No interface contract or brain-side integration path is shipped in this folder.
